creator: kozo-ni@is.naist.jp
text:
My machine is hp ML110 M5.
I installed FreeBSD RELEASE-7.0 amd64 to this machine.
But I couldn' reboot this machine, even if I disabled acpi.
The console stopped next line of Uptime: 6m1s, and no progress.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE amd64 to hp ML110 M5.
# shutdown -r now
